notes: Instalar invariantes IA Coach 072-074: suggestion-not-order, privacy-no-intimate-content, educational-content-independent. Requer enforcement em services + testes + SSOT GAP->IMPLEMENTADO.
assumptions: Tests path canonico: Hb Track - Backend/tests/training/invariants/
Pytest disponivel no ambiente do Executor

tasks.title: IA Coach core (072-074): guards + privacidade + educativo
tasks.description: Implementar enforcement em services e testes para INV-TRAIN-072 (ai_suggestion_not_order), INV-TRAIN-073 (ai_privacy_no_intimate_content), INV-TRAIN-074 (ai_educational_content_independent). Atualizar SSOT para marcar 072/073/074 como IMPLEMENTADO e incluir evidencias (arquivo de teste e/or service).
tasks.criteria: 1) Criar/atualizar services: app/services/ai_coach_service.py e app/services/coach_alerts_service.py com guards. 2) Criar 3 testes: test_inv_train_072_*.py, test_inv_train_073_*.py, test_inv_train_074_*.py. 3) Atualizar SSOT: 072/073/074 status=IMPLEMENTADO. 4) pytest invariants exitcode=0.
risks: Regex de status depende do SSOT conter linhas 'id:' e 'status:' no mesmo bloco do item.
Se o projeto usa outro runner/caminho de pytest, ajustar o comando mantendo a semantica.
